posts.author: MurrayK (Kari Murray )
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We are currently using managed templates and would like to add multi-level subitems and then publish to all the child boards.

What are you trying to achieve

We are using the managed templates for project management and have created our own standardized template and workflow but feel limited with only the one level of subitems. It would be helpful to have the multi-level subitems to build out the critical path and dependencies.
